TEXT.source: Sakizaya Wikipedia, article: R Čhl Čc ČHaising
TEXT.citation: R Čhl Čc ČHaising. (2025, May 05). In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]. https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/R Čhl Čc ČHaising
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_R Čhl Čc ČHaising, title = R Čhl Čc ČHaising, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/R Čhl Čc ČHaising} }

S.FORM: == R Čhl Čc Č/Haising == u sulit nu Hulam ťęėšł≠ťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Kaohsiung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu R Čhl Čc Č/Haising. u kasalumaluma' nu R Čhl Čc Č/Haising sa, 169 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 574 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 521 ku tademaw, pakalatu 91%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 53 ku tademaw, pakalatu 9%. u kasabinacadan, Yuwatan(Bunun) 65%, Rukay(Rukai) 1%, Cou 5%, Paywan(Paiwan) 6%, Laaluwa(Hla'alua) 11%, Pangcha(Amis) 2%, zumazuma 1%.0 u Sakizaya a tademaw inay' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihcan 11 a bulad
S.PHON: == **ńßr~…ĺ* ¶*/ńßaisiŇč == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i kaońßsiuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu **ńßr~…ĺ* ¶*/ńßaisiŇč. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu **ńßr~…ĺ* ¶*/ńßaisiŇč sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, juwatan(bunun) **%, *ukaj(*ukai) *%, ¶ou *%, pajwan(paiwan) *%, r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa(ńßr~…ĺa Ē~ °ar~…ĺua) **%, paŇč ¶ńßa(amis) *%, zumazuma *%.* u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaj Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad
S.FORM: == R Čhl Čc Č/Haising == u sulit nu Hulam ťęėšł≠ťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Kaohsiung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu R Čhl Čc Č/Haising. u kasalumaluma' nu R Čhl Čc Č/Haising sa, 169 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 574 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 521 ku tademaw, pakalatu 91%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 53 ku tademaw, pakalatu 9%. u kasabinacadan, Yuwatan(Bunun) 65%, Rukay(Rukai) 1%, Cou 5%, Paywan(Paiwan) 6%, Laaluwa(Hla'alua) 11%, Pangcha(Amis) 2%, zumazuma 1%.0 u Sakizaya a tademaw inay' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihcan 11 a bulad
S.PHON: == **ńßr~…ĺ* ¶*/ńßaisiŇč == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i kaońßsiuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu **ńßr~…ĺ* ¶*/ńßaisiŇč. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu **ńßr~…ĺ* ¶*/ńßaisiŇč sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, juwatan(bunun) **%, *ukaj(*ukai) *%, ¶ou *%, pajwan(paiwan) *%, r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa(ńßr~…ĺa Ē~ °ar~…ĺua) **%, paŇč ¶ńßa(amis) *%, zumazuma *%.* u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaj Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad
